text:
STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE
Equipment: Feed Pump FP-08
Document No: SOP-001
Hazard Level: HIGH

1. PURPOSE
This procedure describes the lockout/tagout and inspection steps required before
performing maintenance on the Feed Pump FP-08.

2. REQUIRED PPE
Technicians must wear the following before beginning work: hard hat, hearing protection, arc-flash suit.

3. PROCEDURE
   Step 1: Verify guard and enclosure are reinstalled before re-energizing.
   Step 2: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 3: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 4: Notify shift supervisor before returning equipment to service.
   Step 5: Record readings in the CMMS work order.
   Step 6: Check lubrication levels and top off per spec sheet.
   Step 7: Test emergency stop function.
   Step 8: Inspect bearing housing for abnormal vibration or heat discoloration.
   Step 9: Isolate energy source and verify zero energy state.
   Step 10: Inspect bearing housing for abnormal vibration or heat discoloration.
   Step 11: Check lubrication levels and top off per spec sheet.

4. NOTES
Deviations from this procedure must be logged and approved by the maintenance supervisor.

ground_truth.required_ppe: hard hat, hearing protection, arc-flash suit
